title: Google AI Research Proposes Vantage: An LLM-Based Protocol for Measuring Collaboration, Creativity, and Critical Thinking
summary:
Standardized tests can tell you whether a student knows calculus or can parse a passage of text. What they cannot reliably tell you is whether that student can resolve a disagreement with a teammate, generate genuinely original ideas under pressure, or critically dismantle a flawed argument. These are the so-called durable skills — collaboration, creativity, […]

title: A Step-by-Step Coding Tutorial on NVIDIA PhysicsNeMo: Darcy Flow, FNOs, PINNs, Surrogate Models, and Inference Benchmarking
summary:
In this tutorial, we implement NVIDIA PhysicsNeMo on Colab and build a practical workflow for physics-informed machine learning. We start by setting up the environment, generating data for the 2D Darcy Flow problem, and visualizing the physical fields to clearly understand the learning task. title: Meta AI and KAUST Researchers Propose Neural Computers That Fold Computation, Memory, and I/O Into One Learned Model
summary:
Researchers from Meta AI and the King Abdullah University of Science and Technology (KAUST) have introduced Neural Computers (NCs) — a proposed machine form in which a neural network itself acts as the running computer, rather than as a layer sitting on top of one. The research team presents both a theoretical framework and two […]
